title: CrabLaw-CN IP Asset
description: Registration record for a PRC intellectual-property asset. Renewal reminders (续展/年费) are NOT stored here; they are compliance-deadline records (obligationType=license-renewal) so the watcher stays the single source of truth. expiryDate here is the static legal right-term fact, not a task.

ipType.description: trademark=商标; patent-invention=发明专利; patent-utility-model=实用新型专利; patent-design=外观设计专利; copyright=著作权; trade-secret=商业秘密; domain=域名; other=其他

registrationNumber.description: 注册号/申请号/登记号. Omit before filing.

territory.description: Jurisdiction/territory, e.g. CN, 马德里指定国. Default CN.

niceClasses.description: For trademarks, 尼斯分类 class numbers, e.g. 9;35;42.

expiryDate.description: Static end of the legal right term; the renewal TASK is tracked separately via compliance-deadline.

status.description: application=申请中; registered=已注册/授权; rejected=驳回; expired=届满失效; invalidated=被无效/撤销; transferred=已转让; licensed=已许可; other=其他

licensing.description: none=无许可; exclusive=独占许可; sole=排他许可; non-exclusive=普通许可; unknown=未知

sourceRef.description: Pointer to the governing source; required when citationTag is [已核验-来源].
